mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m3.register_date as regDate, m2.nickname, m2.phone_number as phoneNumber FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT JOIN member3 m3 ON m1.member_id = m3.member_id ORDER BY m1.member_id DESC

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, m1.email, m1.username, m1.status, m1.role, m1.gender, m1.birthday, m2.nickname, m2.profile_image, m2.bio, m2.phone_number, m2.last_login_at, m2.equipped_badge_id FROM member1 m1 LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{memberId}
